goal: Compare the standard individual monthly subscription price (billed monthly, USD) of four consumer AI chatbot tiers — ChatGPT Plus, Claude Pro, Google AI Pro (formerly Gemini Advanced), and Perplexity Pro — and determine which single product is the cheapest and its price.
expected: Google AI Pro is the single cheapest at $19.99/month, just under ChatGPT Plus, Claude Pro, and Perplexity Pro, which are each $20/month (a three-way tie for the others), as of 2026-06-18.
answer:
## AI Chatbot Subscription Price Comparison (Monthly, Billed Monthly, USD)

Here is a side-by-side comparison of the four standard individual monthly subscription tiers:

| Rank | Product | Monthly Price (USD) |
|------|---------|-------------------|
| 🥇 1st (Cheapest) | **Google AI Pro** (formerly Gemini Advanced) | **$19.99/mo** |
| 2nd (tied) | ChatGPT Plus | $20.00/mo |
| 2nd (tied) | Claude Pro | $20.00/mo |
| 2nd (tied) | Perplexity Pro | $20.00/mo |

### Key Findings

- **Google AI Pro** is the cheapest at **$19.99/month**, which is $0.01 less than the other three [1].
- **ChatGPT Plus** costs **$20/month** (billed monthly, no annual discount option). This price has remained unchanged since OpenAI launched the tier in February 2023 [2].
- **Claude Pro** costs **$20/month** when billed monthly (drops to ~$17/month if billed annually) [3].
- **Perplexity Pro** costs **$20/month** when billed monthly (drops to ~$16.67/month if billed annually at $200/year) [4].

### Bottom Line

**Google AI Pro (formerly Gemini Advanced) is the cheapest at $19.99/month** — though the margin is razor-thin (just $0.01/month cheaper than the others). In practical terms, all four products sit at effectively the same $20/month price point, with Google's plan being the only one to shave off a penny.
